The Perfumers

The creation of your story scent.

Client
Khaltat
Project Type
360 Campaign
Region
UAE
Duration
3 Months
Executive Summary

A UAE-wide contest campaign that invited perfume enthusiasts to become “perfumers” by mixing and naming their own custom scent using a guided mixing kit—supported by retail VM/installations, a landing page, and multiple campaign videos.

Case Study Rima Alshoufi — Creative Director

The Strategic Pivot

The Challenge

Build a campaign that doesn’t just advertise perfume—but gets people to create perfume. The goal was to make the highly technical, complex craft of perfume mixing accessible and engaging enough to trigger user-generated content (UGC), while maintaining momentum through contest cycles and evaluations.

The Insight

Gen Z and younger audiences deeply desire self-expression and social proof through making something original. While perfumery is often perceived as an exclusive, closed-off craft, positioning it as a "creator tool" bridges the gap between premium luxury and modern maker culture.

The Big Idea

Blending as StorytellingWe invited customers to unleash their creativity and become the masterminds behind their own scent creation. Instead of passive consumption, participants blend, name, and share their signature fragrance, transforming into a vibrant maker community.

"Not just advertising perfume—getting people to create it."
The Perfumers Page 02

The Execution ecosystem

The campaign rolled out as a 360-experience, blending physical material with retail integration and digital scale.

The Perfumers Page 03

Outcomes & Mechanics

The Mechanics
01

The Mixing Kit. Designed as a portable “small laboratory” for experimentation and structured guidance.

02

Retail Integration. Window executions, small display units, and an in-store photo backdrop for immediate sharing.

03

Digital Pipeline. Registration via landing page with QR codes linking to mixing tutorials and inspiration.

04

The Contest Loop. Participants submit their mixes, stories, and share socially before a final jury evaluation.

Confirmed Outcomes

600+

Active participants successfully mixed their own unique scents.

Virality

Organic spread achieved on TikTok and Instagram through campaign hashtags and UGC.

Creative Direction

Role: Concept, naming, storytelling, competition design, and overall creative direction.

The Perfumers Page 04
